Package org.patternfly.component

Class Tabs

java.lang.Object
org.patternfly.component.BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>
org.patternfly.component.Tabs
All Implemented Interfaces:
Container<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>, Finder<HTMLDivElement>, HasElement<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>, HasHTMLElement<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>, IsElement<HTMLDivElement>, TypedBuilder<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>, Component
@Deprecated public class Tabs extends BaseComponent<HTMLDivElement,Tabs>
Deprecated.
PatternFly label component.
